query: SELECT companyId, source, externalId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM maintenance_requests WHERE externalId IS NOT NULL AND externalId != '' GROUP BY companyId, source, externalId HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute SELECT companyId, source, externalId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM maintenance_requests WHERE externalId IS NOT NULL AND externalId != '' GROUP BY companyId, source, externalId HAVING cnt > 1;
